items.description: Keep live hero and background graphics enabled on normal mobile browsers while retaining static fallbacks for reduced motion or unsupported graphics, without flashing fallback imagery before live graphics initialize.
verification: playwright-cli cross-browser desktop and mobile visual checks
playwright-cli reduced-motion and simulated WebGL-failure fallback checks
items.notes: Normal desktop and mobile keep live canvases and do not request fallback image resources. Pending mode reserves layout space until live graphics mount, avoiding the first-load static-image flash. Reduced motion and simulated WebGL failure use WebP static fallbacks. Verification passed; lint/doctor/knip warnings are existing advisory findings outside this slice.
